_comment: Valid layout enum values for set_conference_layout (host_layout / guest_layout). These are Pexip's stock layout codes. Some Pexip versions ship additional custom layouts uploaded via the admin UI — call get_resource_schema('conference') and inspect host_view / guest_view enum values to be sure.

layouts.name: one_main_zero_pips
layouts.description: Single main speaker, no pips. 'Speaker mode' equivalent.

layouts.name: one_main_seven_pips
layouts.description: Main speaker + 7 pips along the bottom.

layouts.name: two_mains_zero_pips
layouts.description: Two main panes side by side.

layouts.name: two_mains_seven_pips
layouts.description: Two mains + 7 pips. Common 'presenter + presentation' layout.

layouts.name: two_mains_twenty_one_pips
layouts.description: Two mains + 21 pips, for larger audiences.

_note: Layout availability and naming depends on Pexip Infinity version. For an exhaustive, version-correct list call get_resource_schema('conference') and read the 'host_view' / 'guest_view' enum values.
